title: CoI Estimator Validation: Accuracy, Consistency, and Subsampling Stability on Planted-Synergy Data
summary: Demo notebook for CoI Estimator Validation experiment. Compares three mutual information estimators (NPEET micd, sklearn+custom KSG, frbourassa cKDTree) on synthetic planted-synergy data with known ground-truth structure. The notebook generates synthetic datasets, runs all three estimators to compute Co-Information matrices, validates against ground truth (XOR synergy pairs, redundant pairs, noise), tests subsampling stability, and checks reproducibility across seeds. Includes 4-panel visualization: CoI heatmap, estimator timing comparison, ground truth validation accuracy, and subsampling stability curve. Uses mini_demo_data.json (32 curated examples across 5 ground-truth types from both easy_2mod_xor and medium_4mod_mixed datasets) as reference data loaded via GitHub URL with local fallback.
